name: Manhattan Apartment Rent
description: Monthly rent ($) for 20 one-bedroom apartments in Manhattan.
studyDescription: Monthly rents for a random sample of 20 one-bedroom apartments in Manhattan, New York City. The sample was drawn from online apartment listings. This is an observational study based on a random sample.

variableDescriptions.rent: Monthly rent for the apartment in US dollars

sourceDetail: Data from the openintro R package (manhattan). Used in introductory statistics for bootstrap confidence interval examples.

inferenceContexts.parameter: the population mean monthly rent for one-bedroom apartments in Manhattan
inferenceContexts.claim: the average monthly rent for a one-bedroom apartment in Manhattan exceeds $2,500
